nasb.text: How shall I curse whom God has not cursed? And how can I denounce whom the Lord has not denounced?

esv.text: How can I curse whom God has not cursed? How can I denounce whom the Lord has not denounced?

cnv.text: 神沒有咒詛的，我怎能咒詛呢？ 耶和華沒有咒罵的，我怎能咒罵呢？

ccb.text: 上帝没有咒诅的， 我怎能咒诅？ 耶和华没有斥责的， 我怎能斥责？
